_comment: MCP Registry entry. Verify the current schema version + field names with `mcp-publisher` (the schema evolves). Namespace uses the GitHub-owned form io.github.<owner>/<repo>, which the registry verifies via the repo. Publish only after the GitHub repo is public and the PyPI package is live.
name: io.github.gearotons/servomotor-mcp
description: Drive Gearotons M17 open-source servomotors from natural language over RS-485 — moves, homing, sequences, telemetry. A thin control layer (full range; the motor's firmware self-protects). Ships a mock backend (no hardware needed).

environmentVariables.name: GEAROTONS_MOTOR_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: 'mock' to try with no hardware (default), or 'serial' to drive real motors over RS-485.

environmentVariables.name: GEAROTONS_SERIAL_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Serial device for the USB-RS485 adapter when backend=serial (e.g. /dev/cu.usbserial-210, /dev/ttyUSB0, COM3).

environmentVariables.name: GEAROTONS_MOTOR_ALIASES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated friendly motor names, e.g. 'x' or 'base,elbow'.

environmentVariables.name: GEAROTONS_SERIAL_MOTORS
environmentVariables.description: JSON map of friendly alias to the motor's device address, e.g. {"x": 88}. Omit to auto-detect the bus.
